From Our Conversation
→Moonlight Doors & Windows has established a proven market advantage by offering custom-made windows and doors imported from China at 20–70% below local pricing, backed by six successful installations and strong referrals.
→The proposed lead generation system combines Facebook and Instagram advertising with a mobile CRM to enable Kane to convert interested homeowners and builders into consultations within 24 hours.
→Initial campaign success demonstrates the model's viability, with recent testing generating 20 qualified leads over two weeks at $30 per lead on a $50 daily ad budget.
→The strategy begins with conceptual ads to establish lead flow, then transitions to professional content showcasing completed projects once the system proves its effectiveness.
